title: heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. transoxanum
intro: Heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. transoxanum, also known as Transoxian heliotrope, is a plant species within the heliotropium genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Heliotropium dasycarpum subsp. transoxanum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies.
